subcodes.first_line: O Leaf! Praise be to the Desire of the world, Who hath, through the instrumentalities of heaven and earth, vouchsafed unto thee His confirmation and guided thee unto the Dayspring of His verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقه حمد مقصود عالم را که باسباب آسمان و زمین ترا تایید فرمود و بمشرق آیات
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort, @Manifestation of God as sun
